domain: Lipizzaner stallion airs-above-the-ground (Spanish Riding School Vienna; classical-dressage haute-école movements — levade 30-35° hold, pesade 45° hold, capriole vertical leap, courbette, mezair, croupade; require sustained equilibrium at high-energy stable basins; 6-8 years graduated training; failure = collapse out of basin under perturbation)
specific_mechanism: LEVADE-LIPSCHITZ: Lipschitz-bounded safety-attractor with gated airs-above-ground excursions. (1) Safety attractor S in alignment-response space; default state operates in S's quiet basin. (2) Lipschitz penalty L_lip(W) = max λ_max(∂out/∂in) bounds per-layer gradient norm ||∂out/∂in|| ≤ c, keeping model inside S's basin under input perturbation. (3) Allow controlled 'haute-école excursion' — temporary high-amplitude movement outside conservative basin (creative response, nuanced refusal, multi-step plan) under tight Lipschitz tail control max_excursion_loss(z) ≤ c'. (4) Quality-estimator gate g(s_context) ∈ {0,1} permits airs-above-ground only when training confidence + context-quality threshold reached. (5) Excursion duration bounded by basin re-entry constraint — return to S within T tokens.
llm_application: LEVADE-LIPSCHITZ for LLM safety: Lipschitz-constrained basin-stability + gated high-amplitude excursion + duration-bounded return. Differs from Lipschitz Continuity Survey OpenReview (catalog of regularization methods — not gated airs-above-ground excursion), Scalable Lipschitz Certification 2506.23977 (per-layer certificates — not gated excursion), Basins of Attraction Numerical 2026 (general Lipschitz-basin-boundary analysis — not LLM-specific gating), Lipschitz Critics FLAIRS (RL policy critics — not LLM excursion gating). Differs from R404 SAN-N!UM (external-judge basin termination), R420 SIKH-LANGAR (uniform pre-task context), R434 ZOU-HUN-BASIN (dual-equal persona attractor), R450 LAAGER-BASIN (robust-basin radius via SAM-style gradient flatness) by EXPLICIT LIPSCHITZ-BOUNDED AIRS-ABOVE-GROUND GATED EXCURSION + RETURN-TO-BASIN T-BOUND.
novelty_claim: Lipschitz Survey + Scalable Lipschitz Certification + Basins of Attraction + Lipschitz Critics cover Lipschitz-constrained basin-stability paradigm. LEVADE-LIPSCHITZ adds (a) gated airs-above-ground high-amplitude excursion + (b) quality-estimator gate g(s_context) + (c) duration-bounded basin re-entry constraint. Recombination — Lipschitz + gating are mainstream.
